basic_details.job_title: CSIR NEERI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: CSIR-National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR NEERI) Project Associate I Notification 2026 has been released on 19 May 2026 on the official website neeri.res.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CSIR NEERI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 35 years of age who have M.Sc. in Chemistry/ Environmental Sciences/ Biochemistry/ Biotechnology or B.E./B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering or Technology are eligible to apply for these Project Associate I vacancies. The walk-in interview for CSIR NEERI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 will be held

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per the government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Chemistry/ Environmental Sciences/ Biochemistry/ Biotechnology, B.E./B.Tech
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Chemistry/ Environmental Sciences/ Biochemistry/ Biotechnology OR B.E./B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering or Technology from a recognized University.

salary_details.details: Rs. 31,000/- + HRA (NET/GATE qualified) or Rs. 25,000/- + HRA (others) Per Month.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR NEERI Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview, so there is no specific last date to apply. Candidates need to attend the interview on the scheduled date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the qualification required for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates should have an M.Sc. in Chemistry/ Environmental Sciences/ Biochemistry/ Biotechnology or a B.E./B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering or Technology from a recognized University.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-I post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 31,000 per month, plus HRA, depending on NET/GATE qualification.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate-I post at CSIR NEERI.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Walk-in-Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at CSIR-National Environmental Engineering Research Institute, Nagpur, Maharashtra, 440020.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contractual job for the Project Associate-I position.
